name: Chicken Breasts with Lemon
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chicken broth, fresh or canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the flour with salt and pepper. Dredge each chicken breast in the seasoned flour, shaking off excess.
2. Heat oil in a heavy skillet large enough to hold the chicken pieces in one layer. Add chicken and cook uncovered over medium heat for 5 minutes or until lightly browned.
3. Turn the chicken and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until cooked through. Remove the skillet from heat; discard used oil.
4. Add thyme, shallots, and garlic to the skillet and cook for about a minute. Do not burn the garlic.
5. Add lemon rind, lemon juice, and broth. Scrape the skillet to dissolve brown particles clinging to the bottom.
6. Add butter and cook for 3 more minutes.
